channel.title: Apollo Intelligence Blog
channel.description: Practical AI insights for business leaders. No hype, just signal.

item.title: 5 AI Automations Every Small Business Should Set Up This Quarter
item.description: Five practical AI automations — email triage, scheduling, customer support, social media, and weekly reporting — that small businesses can set up this quarter to save 10+ hours per week.

item.title: AI-Powered Business Intelligence: From Raw Data to Weekly Insights
item.description: Dashboards don't drive decisions — insights do. Learn how automated AI reporting turns raw business data into plain-English weekly intelligence your team can actually act on.

item.title: The Business Leader's Guide to AI Agents: What They Are and Why They Matter
item.description: AI agents don't just answer questions — they take action. Learn what AI agents are, how they work, real use cases, and what to ask vendors before you buy.

item.title: The AI Tools Reshaping How Businesses Operate in 2026
item.description: Claude 4, GPT-5, and AI agents that take action — here's what actually matters for your business in 2026.
